typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		Date as string,
		Foundation_Name as string,
		Org as string,
		Env as string,
		Space as string,
		App_Name as string,
		Deprecation_Date as string,
		ShortAppId as string,
		Application_Name as string,
		RemedyId as string,
		AppStatus as string,
		AuNumber as string,
		AUOwner as string,
		TechManager as string,
		BusinessAUNumber as string,
		Manager_1 as string,
		Manager_2 as string,
		Manager_3 as string,
		Manager_4 as string,
		Manager_5 as string,
		Manager_6 as string,
		Manager_7 as string,
		Manager_8 as string,
		Manager_9 as string,
		Found as string,
		Platform_Lead as string,
		Manager as string,
		AU_BU as string,
		LOB as string,
		Stack as string,
		Current_Droplet_Buildpack_Name as string,
		App_Last_Updated as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> PCFBuildPacksAllMappings
PCFBuildPacksAllMappings derive(Import_date = currentDate()) ~> ImportDate
ImportDate sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'parquet',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		AU_BU,
		AppStatus,
		Org,
		Foundation_Name,
		Manager_1,
		Env,
		Manager,
		App_Name,
		AUOwner,
		RemedyId,
		Deprecation_Date,
		BusinessAUNumber,
		Buildpack_Name = Current_Droplet_Buildpack_Name,
		Import_date,
		AuNumber,
		LOB,
		Space,
		ShortAppId,
		TechManager,
		Application_Name,
		Found,
		Date,
		Manager_8,
		Manager_9,
		Manager_6,
		Manager_7,
		Manager_4,
		Manager_5,
		Manager_2,
		Platform_Lead,
		Manager_3
	)) ~> OLEDBDestination
